name: Peninsula Energy Limited
analysis: PEN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4900, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.6200 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
